_comment: Official DHL Fastest Pit Stop per round (stationary 'wheels-up' time, 2 decimals) copied from https://www.formula1.com/en/results/2026/awards/fastest-pit-stops . MANUALLY maintained: after each race, add the round's fastest-stop team + time here. Round keys are INTERNAL rounds (cancelled R4/R5 skipped). 'team' uses constructor_id.
